Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Princess nominated & executed a player on their 1st day, no one dies to the Al-Hadikhia ability tonight.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Princess nominated & executed a player on their 1st day, no one dies to the Al-Hadikhia tonight.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Princess nominated & executed a player on their 1st day, no one dies to the Al-Hadikhia tonight.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Alchemist has the Boffin ability, the Alchemist does not learn what ability the Demon has.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Alchemist has the Boffin ability, the Alchemist does not learn what ability the Demon has.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: An Alchemist-Marionette has no Marionette ability & the Marionette is in play.
Jinx List.Jinx: An Alchemist-Marionette has no Marionette ability & the Marionette is in play.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: An Alchemist-Mastermind has no Mastermind ability & the Mastermind is not-in-play.
Jinx List.Jinx: An Alchemist-Mastermind has no Mastermind ability & the Mastermind is not-in-play.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Alchemist has the Organ Grinder ability, the Organ Grinder is in play & if both the Alchemist and Organ Grinder are sober, both are drunk.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Alchemist has the Organ Grinder ability, the Organ Grinder is in play. If both are sober, both are drunk.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Alchemist has the Organ Grinder ability, the Organ Grinder is in play. If both are sober, both are drunk.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Alchemist has the Spy ability, they do not, and a Spy is in play. Each day, after the execution phase, the living Alchemist may publicly guess a living player as the Spy. If correct, the Demon must choose the Spy tonight.
Jinx List.New Jinx: An Alchemist-Spy has no Spy ability & a Spy is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Spy may publicly guess a living player as the Spy. If correct, the Demon must choose the Spy tonight.
Jinx List.Jinx: An Alchemist-Spy has no Spy ability & a Spy is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Spy may publicly guess a living player as the Spy. If correct, the Demon must choose the Spy tonight.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Alchemist-Summoner does not get bluffs, and chooses which Demon but not which player. If they die before this happens, evil wins. [No Demon]
Jinx List.Jinx: The Alchemist-Summoner does not get bluffs, and chooses which Demon but not which player. If they die before this happens, evil wins. [No Demon]

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Alchemist has the Widow ability, they do not, and a Widow is in play. Each day, after the execution phase, the living Alchemist may publicly guess a living player as the Widow. If correct, the Demon must choose the Widow tonight.
Jinx List.New Jinx: An Alchemist-Widow has no Widow ability & a Widow is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Widow may publicly guess a living player as the Widow. If correct, the Demon must choose the Widow tonight.
Jinx List.Jinx: An Alchemist-Widow has no Widow ability & a Widow is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Widow may publicly guess a living player as the Widow. If correct, the Demon must choose the Widow tonight.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Alchemist has the Wraith ability, they do not, and a Wraith is in play. Each day, after the execution phase, the living Alchemist may publicly guess a living player as the Wraith: if correct, the Demon must choose the Wraith tonight.
Jinx List.New Jinx: An Alchemist-Wraith has no Wraith ability & a Wraith is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Wraith may publicly guess a living player as the Wraith. If correct, the Demon must choose the Wraith tonight.
Jinx List.Jinx: An Alchemist-Wraith has no Wraith ability & a Wraith is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Wraith may publicly guess a living player as the Wraith. If correct, the Demon must choose the Wraith tonight.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Demon has the Cult Leader ability, they can’t turn good due to this ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Demon has the Cult Leader ability, they can’t turn good due to this ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Demon would have the Drunk ability, the Boffin chooses a Townsfolk player to have this ability instead.
Jinx List.New Jinx: The Demon cannot have the Drunk ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Demon cannot have the Drunk ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Demon has the Goon ability, they can’t turn good due to this ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Demon has the Goon ability, they can’t turn good due to this ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Demon cannot have the Ogre ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Demon cannot have the Ogre ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Demon cannot have the Politician ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Demon cannot have the Politician ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If there is a spare token, the Boffin can give the Demon the Village Idiot ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: If there is a spare token, the Boffin can give the Demon the Village Idiot ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: An evil Townsfolk is only created if the Bounty Hunter is still in play after the Kazali acts.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Kazali turns the Bounty Hunter into a Minion, an evil Townsfolk is not created.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Kazali turns the Bounty Hunter into a Minion, an evil Townsfolk is not created.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Philosopher gains the Bounty Hunter ability, a Townsfolk might turn evil.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Philosopher gains the Bounty Hunter ability, a Townsfolk might turn evil.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Organ Grinder is causing eyes closed voting, the Butler may raise their hand to vote but their vote is only counted if their master voted too.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Organ Grinder is causing eyes closed voting, the Butler may raise their hand to vote but their vote is only counted if their master voted too.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Cannibal gains the Butler ability, the Cannibal learns this.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Cannibal gains the Butler ability, the Cannibal learns this.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Juggler guesses on their first day and dies by execution, tonight the living Cannibal learns how many guesses the Juggler got correct.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Juggler guesses on their first day and dies by execution, tonight the living Cannibal learns how many guesses the Juggler got correct.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Cannibal nominated, executed, & killed the Princess today, the Demon doesn’t kill tonight.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Cannibal nominated, executed, & killed the Princess today, the Demon doesn’t kill tonight.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Cannibal gains the Zealot ability, the Cannibal learns this.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Cannibal gains the Zealot ability, the Cannibal learns this.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Cerenovus may choose to make a player mad that they are the Goblin.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Cerenovus may choose to make a player mad that they are the Goblin.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Baron might only add 1 Outsider, not 2.
Jinx List.New Jinx: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
Jinx List.Jinx: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Demon cannot have the Heretic ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Demon cannot have the Heretic ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
Jinx List.Jinx: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Lleech has poisoned the Heretic then the Lleech dies, the Heretic remains poisoned.
Jinx List.New Jinx: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
Jinx List.Jinx: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: A Pit-Hag can not create a Heretic.
Jinx List.New Jinx: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
Jinx List.Jinx: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Kazali can not choose the King to become a Minion if a Choirboy is in play.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Kazali can not choose the King to become a Minion if a Choirboy is in play.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Kazali can choose that the Goon player is one of their evil Minions.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Kazali can choose that the Goon player is one of their evil Minions.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Kazali chooses the Damsel to become a Minion, and a Huntsman is in play, a good player becomes the Damsel.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Kazali chooses the Damsel to become a Minion, and a Huntsman is in play, a good player becomes the Damsel.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Kazali chooses to create a Marionette, they must choose one of their neighbors.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If there would be a Marionette in play, they enter play after the Demon & must start as their neighbor.
Jinx List.Jinx: If there would be a Marionette in play, they enter play after the Demon & must start as their neighbor.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Kazali can choose that the Soldier player is one of their evil Minions.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Kazali can choose that the Soldier player is one of their evil Minions.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Legion and the Engineer can not both be in play at the start of the game. If the Engineer creates Legion, most players (including all evil players) become evil Legion.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If Legion is created, all evil players become Legion. If Legion is in play, the Engineer starts knowing this but has no ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: If Legion is created, all evil players become Legion. If Legion is in play, the Engineer starts knowing this but has no ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Hatter dies and Legion is in play, nothing happens. If the Hatter dies and an evil player chooses Legion, all current evil players become Legion.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If Legion is created, all evil players become Legion. If Legion is in play, the Hatter has no ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: If Legion is created, all evil players become Legion. If Legion is in play, the Hatter has no ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If Legion died by execution today, Legion keeps their ability, but the Minstrel might learn they are Legion.
Jinx List.Jinx: If Legion died by execution today, Legion keeps their ability, but the Minstrel might learn they are Legion.

Jinx List.New Jinx: The Politician might register as evil to Legion.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Politician might register as evil to Legion.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Preacher chooses Legion, Legion keeps their ability, but the Preacher might learn they are Legion.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Preacher chooses Legion, Legion keeps their ability, but the Preacher might learn they are Legion.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Zealot might register as evil to Legion's ability.
Jinx List.New Jinx: The Zealot might register as evil to Legion.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Zealot might register as evil to Legion.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Banshee dies & gains their ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Banshee dies & gains their ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Evil does not win when more than 1 good player has been executed, if the Exorcist is alive and has ever successfully chosen the Leviathan.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Exorcist-chosen player, good wins.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Exorcist-chosen player, good wins.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Farmer uses their ability but does not die.
Jinx List.Jinx: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Farmer uses their ability but does not die.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If Leviathan is in play and the Grandchild dies by execution, evil wins.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Leviathan is in play and the Grandchild dies by execution, evil wins.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Leviathan is in play and the Grandchild dies by execution, evil wins.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Hatter dies on or after day 5, the Demon cannot choose Leviathan.
Jinx List.New Jinx: The Leviathan cannot enter play after day 5.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Leviathan cannot enter play after day 5.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Leviathan is in play, the Innkeeper-protected-players are safe from all evil abilities.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Leviathan nominates and executes an Innkeeper-protected player, good wins.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Leviathan nominates and executes an Innkeeper-protected player, good wins.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Leviathan is in play, and at least 1 player is dead, the King learns an alive character each night.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Leviathan is in play, and at least 1 player is dead, the King learns an alive character each night.

Jinx List.Problem Type: No Death At Night, No Ability
Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Leviathan is in play & no execution occurs on day 5, good wins.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Leviathan and the Mayor are alive on day 5 & no execution occurs, good wins.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Leviathan and the Mayor are alive on day 5 & no execution occurs, good wins.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Leviathan is in play, the Monk-protected-player is safe from all evil abilities.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Monk-protected player, good wins.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Monk-protected player, good wins.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: After day 5, the Pit-Hag cannot choose Leviathan.
Jinx List.New Jinx: The Leviathan cannot enter play after day 5.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Leviathan cannot enter play after day 5.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive player (different to previous nights): a chosen Ravenkeeper uses their ability but does not die.
Jinx List.Jinx: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive player (different to previous nights): a chosen Ravenkeeper uses their ability but does not die.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Sage uses their ability but does not die.
Jinx List.Jinx: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Sage uses their ability but does not die.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Leviathan is in play, the Soldier is safe from all evil abilities.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Soldier, good wins.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Soldier, good wins.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If a Demon chooses Lil' Monsta, they also choose a Minion to become and babysit Lil' Monsta tonight.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Hatter dies & the Demon chooses Lil' Monsta, they also choose a Minion to become.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Hatter dies & the Demon chooses Lil' Monsta, they also choose a Minion to become.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Poppy Grower is in play, Minions don't wake together. They are woken one by one, until one of them chooses to take the Lil' Monsta token.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If Lil' Monsta & the Poppy Grower are alive, Minions wake one by one, until one of them chooses to take the Lil' Monsta token.
Jinx List.Jinx: If Lil' Monsta & the Poppy Grower are alive, Minions wake one by one, until one of them chooses to take the Lil' Monsta token.

Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Psychopath is babysitting Lil' Monsta, they die when executed.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Psychopath is babysitting Lil' Monsta, they die when executed.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If there are 5 or more players alive and the player holding the Lil' Monsta token dies, the Scarlet Woman is given the Lil' Monsta token tonight.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If Lil' Monsta dies with 5 or more players alive, the Scarlet Woman babysits Lil' Monsta for the rest of the game.
Jinx List.Jinx: If Lil' Monsta dies with 5 or more players alive, the Scarlet Woman babysits Lil' Monsta for the rest of the game.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Vizier can die by execution if they are babysitting Lil' Monsta.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Vizier is babysitting Lil' Monsta, they die when executed.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Vizier is babysitting Lil' Monsta, they die when executed.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Mastermind is alive and the Lleech's host dies by execution, the Lleech lives but loses their ability.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Mastermind is alive and the Lleech host dies by execution, the Lleech lives but loses their ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Mastermind is alive and the Lleech host dies by execution, the Lleech lives but loses their ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Slayer slays the Lleech's host, the host dies.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Slayer slays the Lleech host, the host dies.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Slayer slays the Lleech host, the host dies.

Jinx List.New Jinx: The Magician wakes with Legion and might register as evil. Legion knows if a Magician is in play, but not which player it is.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Magician wakes with Legion and might register as evil. Legion knows if a Magician is in play, but not which player it is.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Each night, the Magician chooses a Minion: if that Minion & Lil' Monsta are alive, that Minion babysits Lil’ Monsta.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Magician is alive, the Storyteller chooses which Minion babysits Lil' Monsta.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Magician is alive, the Storyteller chooses which Minion babysits Lil' Monsta.

Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Magician is alive, the Demon doesn't know which neighbor is the Marionette.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Magician is alive, the Demon doesn't know which neighbor is the Marionette.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: When the Spy sees the Grimoire, the Demon and Magician's character tokens are removed.
Jinx List.Jinx: When the Spy sees the Grimoire, the Demon and Magician's character tokens are removed.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Vizier and Magician are both in play, the Demon does not learn the Minions.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Vizier is in play, the Magician has no ability but is immune to the Vizier's ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Vizier is in play, the Magician has no ability but is immune to the Vizier's ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: When the Widow sees the Grimoire, the Demon and Magician's character tokens are removed.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Each day, after the execution phase, the living Magician may publicly guess a living player as the Wraith: if correct, the Demon must choose the Wraith tonight.

Jinx List.Jinx: After each execution, the living Magician may publicly guess a living player as the Wraith. If correct, the Demon must choose the Wraith tonight.

Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Marionette thinks that they are the Balloonist, an Outsider might have been added during setup.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Marionette thinks that they are the Balloonist, an Outsider might have been added during setup.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Marionette does not learn that a Damsel is in play.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Marionette thinks that they are the Huntsman, the Damsel was added.

Jinx List.Jinx: If the Marionette thinks that they are the Huntsman, the Damsel was added during setup.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Banshee dies & gains their ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Banshee dies & gains their ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Exorcist chooses Riot on the 3rd night, Minions do not become Riot.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If Riot nominates and executes the Exorcist-chosen player, good wins.
Jinx List.Jinx: If Riot nominates and executes the Exorcist-chosen player, good wins.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Farmer uses their ability but does not die.
Jinx List.Jinx: Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Farmer uses their ability but does not die.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If Riot is in play and the Grandchild dies during the day, the Grandmother dies too.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If Riot is in play and the Grandchild dies by execution, evil wins.
Jinx List.Jinx: If Riot is in play and the Grandchild dies by execution, evil wins.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If Riot is in play, the Innkeeper-protected player is safe from all evil abilities.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If Riot nominates and executes an Innkeeper-protected player, good wins.
Jinx List.Jinx: If Riot nominates and executes an Innkeeper-protected player, good wins.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If Riot is in play, and at least 1 player is dead, the King learns an alive character each night.
Jinx List.Jinx: If Riot is in play, and at least 1 player is dead, the King learns an alive character each night.

Jinx List.Problem Type: No Death At Night, No Ability
Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Mayor may choose to stop nominations. If they do so when only 1 Riot is alive, good wins. Otherwise, evil wins.
Jinx List.New Jinx: The Mayor may choose to stop the riot. If they do so when only 1 Riot is alive, good wins. Otherwise, evil wins.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Mayor may choose to stop the riot. If they do so when only 1 Riot is alive, good wins. Otherwise, evil wins.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If Riot is in play, the Monk-protected player is safe from all evil abilities.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If Riot nominates and executes the Monk-protected player, good wins.
Jinx List.Jinx: If Riot nominates and executes the Monk-protected player, good wins.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Ravenkeeper uses their ability but does not die.
Jinx List.Jinx: Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Ravenkeeper uses their ability but does not die.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Sage uses their ability but does not die.
Jinx List.Jinx: Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Sage uses their ability but does not die.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If Riot is in play, the Soldier is safe from all evil abilities.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If Riot nominates and executes the Soldier, good wins.
Jinx List.Jinx: If Riot nominates and executes the Soldier, good wins.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If there are two living Al-Hadikhias, the Scarlet Woman Al-Hadikhia becomes the Scarlet Woman again.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If there would be two Demons, one of which was the Scarlet Woman, the Scarlet Woman becomes the Scarlet Woman again.
Jinx List.Jinx: If there would be two Demons, one of which was the Scarlet Woman, the Scarlet Woman becomes the Scarlet Woman again.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Fang Gu chooses an Outsider and dies, the Scarlet Woman does not become the Fang Gu.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If there would be two Demons, one of which was the Scarlet Woman, the Scarlet Woman remains the Scarlet Woman.
Jinx List.Jinx: If there would be two Demons, one of which was the Scarlet Woman, the Scarlet Woman remains the Scarlet Woman.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Spy is (or has been) in play, the Damsel is poisoned.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Spy is (or has been) in play, the Damsel is poisoned.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Spy registers as evil to the Ogre.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Spy registers as evil to the Ogre.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Poppy Grower is in play, the Spy does not see the Grimoire until the Poppy Grower dies.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Poppy Grower has their ability, the Spy does not see the Grimoire.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Poppy Grower has their ability, the Spy does not see the Grimoire.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Summoner is in play, the Clockmaker does not receive their information until a Demon is created.
Jinx List.New Jinx: The Summoner registers as the Demon to the Clockmaker.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Summoner registers as the Demon to the Clockmaker.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Summoner is drunk on the 3rd night, the Summoner chooses which Demon, but the Storyteller chooses which player.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the living Summoner has no ability, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the living Summoner has no ability, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Engineer removes a Summoner from play before that Summoner uses their ability, the Summoner uses their ability immediately.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the living Summoner is removed from play, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the living Summoner is removed from play, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Summoner cannot create an in-play Demon. If the Summoner creates a not-in-play Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Summoner cannot create an in-play Demon. If the Summoner creates a not-in-play Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Summoner creates Legion, most players (including all evil players) become evil Legion.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If Legion is summoned, all evil players become Legion.
Jinx List.Jinx: If Legion is summoned, all evil players become Legion.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Summoner creates a Lord of Typhon, the Lord of Typhon must neighbor a Minion. The other neighbor becomes a not-in-play evil Minion.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If a Lord of Typhon is summoned, they must neighbor a Minion & their other neighbor becomes an evil Minion.
Jinx List.Jinx: If a Lord of Typhon is summoned, they must neighbor a Minion & their other neighbor becomes an evil Minion.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Marionette neighbors the Summoner. The Summoner knows who the Marionette is.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If there would be a Marionette in play, they enter play after the Demon & must start as their neighbor.
Jinx List.Jinx: If there would be a Marionette in play, they enter play after the Demon & must start as their neighbor.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Summoner cannot create an in-play Demon. If the Summoner creates a not-in-play Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Poppy Grower is alive when the Summoner acts, the Summoner chooses which Demon, but the Storyteller chooses which player.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Poppy Grower is alive on the 3rd night, the Summoner chooses which Demon but not which player.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Poppy Grower is alive on the 3rd night, the Summoner chooses which Demon but not which player.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Preacher chose the Summoner on or before the 3rd night, the Summoner chooses which Demon, but the Storyteller chooses which player.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the living Summoner has no ability, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the living Summoner has no ability, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Summoner may choose a player to become the Pukka on the 2nd night.
Jinx List.New Jinx: The Summoner may summon a Pukka on the 2nd night instead of the 3rd.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Summoner may summon a Pukka on the 2nd night instead of the 3rd.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Summoner turns a dead player into the Zombuul, the Storyteller treats that player as a Zombuul that has died once.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Summoner summons a dead player into the Zombuul, the Zombuul has already "died once".
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Summoner summons a dead player into the Zombuul, the Zombuul has already "died once".

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Vizier is in play, the Alsaahir must also guess which Demon(s) are in play.
Jinx List.New Jinx: The Storyteller doesn't declare the Vizier is in play.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Storyteller doesn't declare the Vizier is in play.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Vizier loses their ability, they learn this. If the Vizier is executed while they have their ability, their team wins.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Vizier loses their ability, they learn this, and cannot die during the day.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Vizier loses their ability, they learn this, and cannot die during the day.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Vizier wakes with the Fearmonger, learns who they choose and cannot choose to immediately execute that player.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Vizier wakes with the Fearmonger, learns who they choose and cannot choose to immediately execute that player.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Investigator learns that the Vizier is in play, the existence of the Vizier is not announced by the Storyteller.
Jinx List.New Jinx: The Storyteller doesn't declare the Vizier is in play.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Storyteller doesn't declare the Vizier is in play.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Politician might register as evil to the Vizier.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Politician might register as evil to the Vizier.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Vizier loses their ability, they learn this. If the Vizier is executed while they have their ability, their team wins.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Vizier loses their ability, they learn this, and cannot die during the day.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Vizier loses their ability, they learn this, and cannot die during the day.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: The Zealot might register as evil to the Vizier.
Jinx List.Jinx: The Zealot might register as evil to the Vizier.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Vortox is in play and the Demon kills the Banshee, the players still learn that the Banshee has died.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Vortox kills the Banshee, all players learn that the Banshee has died.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Vortox kills the Banshee, all players learn that the Banshee has died.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Widow is (or has been) in play, the Damsel is poisoned.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Widow is (or has been) in play, the Damsel is poisoned.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Poppy Grower is in play, the Widow does not see the Grimoire until the Poppy Grower dies.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Poppy Grower has their ability, the Widow does not see the Grimoire.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Poppy Grower has their ability, the Widow does not see the Grimoire.

Jinx List.Old Jinx: If the Exorcist chooses the Yaggababble, the Yaggababble ability does not kill tonight.
Jinx List.New Jinx: If the Exorcist chooses the Yaggababble, the Yaggababble does not kill tonight.
Jinx List.Jinx: If the Exorcist chooses the Yaggababble, the Yaggababble does not kill tonight.
